Project Overview

Built from nothing

LuxeWear is a luxury fashion DTC brand built as a portfolio project to demonstrate what a real Shopify developer can produce without templates, apps, or shortcuts. Every pixel and every function was written by hand.

The brief was uncompromising: build a complete Shopify theme with no third-party base, no page builders, and no shortcuts. Every section, snippet, layout, and script written entirely by hand in Shopify Liquid and vanilla JavaScript.

The approach combines technical engineering with conversion strategy. A beautiful store that doesn't convert is just an expensive brochure, so every design decision was made with revenue in mind.

◈
100% Custom Code
16 custom sections, 9 snippets, 7 JSON templates, 1 master layout. Every line written by hand. Zero Gempages, zero PageFly, zero shortcuts.

What Was Built

Every feature,
hand-coded

From the announcement bar to the sticky ATC, every interaction is custom Liquid and vanilla JavaScript. No libraries. No copy-paste. Just code that works.

◐
Split Hero Section
Two-column layout with editorial lifestyle image, animated title (Bodoni Moda), and seasonal copy. Staggered fade-up animations at 0.2s intervals.
Homepage
⊞
AJAX Cart Drawer
Full cart drawer with fetch() API. Add, remove, update quantity. All without page reload. Live count badge, tiered discount engine, free shipping logic.
Cart
◈
Hero → Toolbar Collapse
Collection hero collapses into sticky toolbar on scroll via IntersectionObserver. Title slides in with translateY animation. Zero scroll listeners.
Collection
⬡
Shopify Tag Filtering
Server-side filtering using /collections/handle/tag URL pattern. Always accurate, SEO-friendly, works across all pagination. No client-side hacks.
Collection
◎
Image Zoom System
Hover: scale(1.06) with mouse-position transform-origin for parallax zoom. Click: scale(2.2) deep zoom. ESC to exit. Pure CSS + JS, no library.
Product Page
≡
Animated Accordion
Description always expanded. Care, Shipping, Craftsmanship — max-height transition expand/collapse. Plus icon rotates 45° on open.
Product Page
✦
Wishlist System
localStorage-based wishlist persisting across sessions. Heart button on every card and PDP. Full wishlist drawer with remove functionality.
CRO
⊕
Quick Add Popup
Hover product card → Select Size panel. Full variant UI with colour swatches, size buttons, and sold-out logic. Adds via AJAX without page navigation.
CRO
◉
Recently Viewed
localStorage tracks last 4 visited products. Section renders after viewing 2+ products. Full CRO product cards with wishlist and quick-add.
CRO
Conversion Suite

12 CRO systems.
Zero apps.

Every conversion feature built from scratch. No Bold, no ReConvert, no Klaviyo popup. Each system is custom Liquid and JavaScript. That means no monthly app fees and full control over every behavior.

12
01
Exit Intent Popup
Mouse-to-top trigger. 15% WELCOME15 discount. localStorage cooldown prevents repeat shows. Split image and form layout.
02
Bundle & Save
1 piece vs 2 pieces saves 10%. Bidirectional sync with quantity buttons. Green savings note appears on 2+ selection. Price updates dynamically.
03
Tiered Cart Discounts
2 items unlocks 10%, 3 gets 15%, 4 or more gets 20%. Live progress bar fills toward next tier. Green badge confirms the active discount. Tier table shown in cart footer.
04
Free Shipping Trigger
Unlocks at 2+ items. Green checkmark in cart perks strip. Acts as motivator alongside tiered discounts.
05
Back-in-Stock Notify
Only renders when variants are sold out. Per-size email form. Success state confirmation. Production-ready for Klaviyo.
06
Quick Add Popup
Hover → Select Size. Full variant UI without page navigation. Colour + size + sold-out logic. AJAX add to cart.
07
Wishlist System
localStorage persistence across sessions. Active on every product card and PDP. Full drawer with remove. No app, no metafields.
08
Size Recommendation
Reads material metafield. Cashmere: size down. Silk: true to size. Hidden automatically for shoes and accessories.
09
Social Proof
Pulsing green dot showing live viewers. Randomized 8 to 18 range, realistic spread. Refreshes on every page load.
10
Sticky ATC Bar
Slides up on scroll past ATC section. Hides at footer via IntersectionObserver. Product image, name, variant, Add to Bag.
11
Recently Viewed
localStorage tracks viewed products across navigations. Triggers after 2 products viewed. Full CRO cards with Quick Add on hover.
12
Active Filter Badges
Tag URL filters with a clear button. sessionStorage restores filter state on back navigation. No page reload needed.

Technical Architecture

OS 2.0 structure,
zero compromise

Folder Count Description
sections/16 filesHomepage hero, featured collection, editorial band, category strip, values strip, newsletter, announcement bar, exit popup, header, footer, main-collection, main-product, crosssell, recently-viewed, all custom pages
snippets/9 filesproduct-card, quick-add-popup, wishlist, conversion-snippets, bundle-save, back-in-stock, size-recommendation, recently-viewed-pdp. Each independently rendered.
assets/2 filesluxewear.css (~77KB, 1,500+ rules, CSS custom properties design system) + luxewear.js (~27KB, zero dependencies, all vanilla ES6+)
templates/7 JSONindex, collection, product, list-collections, page.contact, page.about, page.size-guide, page.developer. All OS 2.0 JSON format.
layout/theme.liquidMaster layout rendering cart drawer, wishlist drawer, and quick-add popup globally. Deferred JS loading. Accessibility skip link. Developer meta tag.
Liquid — CRO Data Attributes
{% comment %} CRO-optimised product card with tag filtering {% endcomment %}
<div class="pcard"
     data-product-id="{{ product.id }}"
     data-tags="{{ product.tags | join: ',' | downcase }}"
     data-type="{{ product.product_type | downcase }}"
     data-available="{{ product.available }}">
Pages & Templates

Every page,
custom built

About
/pages/about
About Page
Dark editorial hero, brand story, values grid, craft section with pull quote, contact CTA.
Contact
/pages/contact
Contact Page
Split dark/light layout. Shopify native form with subject dropdown and full validation.
Size
/pages/size-guide
Size Guide
Measurement guide, clothing table (XS–XL / UK/EU/US), shoe sizes, material fit notes.
Collections
/collections
Collections List
Custom grid replacing Shopify default. First card spans 2 columns as featured hero.
Developer
/pages/built-by-lebron-james-dg-rodriguez
Developer Page
Portfolio proof page. Skills, tech stack, 3 verification methods, authorship evidence.
8 Collections
/collections/[handle]
Collection Template
One template powers 8 collections: Outerwear, Knitwear, Dresses, New Arrivals, Sale, and more.
